## Summary

Describe the change and the public behavior it affects.

Linked issue or discussion:

Design agreement summary:

## Scope

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Test or CI update
- [ ] Public API behavior
- [ ] Public JSON/corpus/API contract
- [ ] Packaging or dependency change

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run --extra test python tests/rack.py run L0_foundation`
- [ ] `uv run --extra test python tests/rack.py run L99_signoff`
- [ ] Targeted tests:
- [ ] Manual API/workflow run, if relevant:

## Public Surface And Contracts

- [ ] No public API, JSON, corpus, or generated-artifact contract changed
- [ ] Public behavior was discussed and agreed before this PR, if changed
- [ ] Public API contract updated if promoted exports changed
- [ ] API design docs updated if promoted classes or major interfaces changed
- [ ] Contract docs updated for stable JSON/corpus/API changes
- [ ] Conformance tests updated for stable JSON/corpus/API changes

## Dependencies And Release Impact

- [ ] No new dependency
- [ ] New dependency is justified in this PR and has compatible licensing
- [ ] Release notes or ADR added for compatibility, policy, or public contract changes

## Signoff

- [ ] Commit messages are concise, factual, and contain no emoji
- [ ] PR summary is to the point and limited to facts
- [ ] Human signoff names the responsible person or GitHub user ID
- [ ] AI assistance is noted as implementation context only, if applicable

Human signoff:

AI assistance note, if applicable:

## Notes For Reviewers

Mention fixtures, corpus files, or hardware-design context needed to review this change.
